{{Quote|Fafnir an' his hairy hordes have ''power skis'', but to catch up with the ''sled,'' we need the likes of this ''snow flier''--|Odan|<ref name="death trap" />}}
A '''snow flyer''' was a type of vehicle mainly used on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Akuria II]]. The craft was designed to move quickly over the icy terrain of the planet, but for some reason needed a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to regulate its movements. For this use, a sturdy [[T-3]] unit was primarily situated in the back end of a snow flyer, however, certain particularly hardy [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]] could also fill the same role.<ref name="death trap" /> Snow flyers were used both by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on Akuria II.<ref name="showdown" /> It had an automatic safety system that caused the vehicle to stop when the canopy opened.<ref name="pursuit" />
